name: Talon MS (strike + DLZ)
_doc: Capstone MS payload (docs/03 World 3, level 3.4): the 3.3 strike store plus a Dynamic Launch Zone. The DLZ is a single range ring around the target at (1400, -800); the strike only completes once the FA vehicle is within RangeMaxAero (500 m) of it. Deterministic, no RNG (CLAUDE.md rule #3).
